title: Monitor workflow state
description: Threaded state for the observe → gate → action pattern.

signal.description: The raw incoming signal to observe (e.g. a metric reading, a log line).

metric.description: The observer's normalized metric, fed to the threshold gate.

action_taken.description: What the action node did (or would do); the audit record on breach.

status.description: Terminal status note (e.g. 'ok' from the no-op terminal).
